name: Healius Limited
analysis: HLS has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 64% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.3900, stop A$0.2970, target A$0.5350 (1.56:1) — then trail it.
